authority_boundary: External frameworks may be crosswalked, mapped, and compared in the wiki. They do not become canonical Admissible-Existence formalism sources unless separately accepted by the canonical source process.

records.name: GLM
records.external_role: machine-readable boundary declaration and pre-admissibility interpretation frame
non_claims: GLM is not a canonical Admissible-Existence formalism source in this registry.
GLM does not prove transition admissibility.
GLM declarations may support review but do not replace commit-time validity.
A GLM source URL is evidence of the external framework artifact, not acceptance of equivalence.

records.name: EVIDE
records.external_role: post-event evidentiary reconstructability and dispute-support framework
non_claims: EVIDE is not a canonical Admissible-Existence formalism source in this registry.
EVIDE does not prove transition admissibility.
Evidence remaining after an event does not prove that the event had commit-time standing.
An EVIDE source URL is evidence of the external framework artifact, not acceptance of equivalence.
